hero.title: Codsashada mashruuca helitaanka
hero.lead: IATF waxay dib u eegis ku sameysaa codsiyada mashaariicda marin u helka ee ka bilaabma baahida dhabta ah.
support: Uma baahnid faahfaahin dhamaystiran. Dhibaato cad, cidda ay saameyneyso, iyo sababta ay muhiim u tahay ayaa ku filan in laga bilaabo.

intro: Dhammaan wadooyinka waxay galaan isla dib u eegista.

items.label: Bogga internetka
items.body: Si aad u soo gudbiso codsi qaab-dhismeed leh, isticmaal foomka hoose.

items.label: Warqadda e-mailka
items.body: Codsiga si toos ah ugu dir {{contact.requestsEmail}}Codsiyada emaylka waxaa laga yaabaa inay noqdaan diiwaanada codsiyada dadweynaha ka dib dib u eegista iyo tirtirka.

items.label: Khilaafka
items.body: Halkaas ka bilaw haddii ay kuu sahlan tahay. codsiga wali wuxuu u wareegayaa isla dib u eegista.

guidance.title: Ka hor intaadan codsi dirin
paragraphs: IATF waxay ka shaqeysaa meel fagaare ah. Codsiyada waxaa lagu soo koobi karaa oo lagu daabici karaa diiwaanada codsiyada dadweynaha ee hay'adda GitHub, websaydhkan, ama labadaba.

Ha ku darin cinwaanada gaarka ah, lambarrada taleefanka, faahfaahinta caafimaadka, ama aqoonsiga macluumaadka ku saabsan isticmaaleyaasha shakhsiga ah ee tikniyoolajiyadaha taageerada haddii aysan lagama maarmaan ahayn oo aadan ku qanacsaneyn in IATF dib u eegis ku sameyso.
IATF waxay tirtirtaa faahfaahinta xiriirka shakhsiga ah ee aan loo baahnayn ka hor intaan la daabacin diiwaanka codsiga.

review.title: Dib u eegista waxyaabaha la filayo
paragraphs: Soo gudbinta codsigu damaanad uma aha in la aqbalo.
IATF waxay dib u eegis ku sameysaa codsiyada ku saabsan ku habboonaanta howlgalka, suurtagalnimada, faa'iidada, iyo in shaqadu ku habboon tahay keydka dadweynaha.
Codsiyada qaarkood waa la diidi karaa, dib loo dhigi karaa, ama dib loo qaabeyn karaa ka hor inta aan la aqbalin.

fields.name: Faahfaahinta xiriirka
fields.label: Faahfaahinta xiriirka
fields.helper: Cinwaanka emaylka ama cinwaanka Discord si aad ula socoto.

fields.name: afka hooyo
fields.label: Luqadda
fields.helper: Luqadda aad doorbideyso, haddii ay khuseyso.

fields.name: Dhibaato
fields.label: Dhibaato noocee ah ayaad isku dayeysaa inaad xalliso?
fields.helper: Qeex caqabadda adigoo isticmaalaya luuqad fudud.

fields.name: macnaha guud
fields.label: Macnaha guud ee dheeraadka ah
fields.helper: La wadaag wax kasta oo kale oo kaa caawinaya sharaxaadda baahida: sababta ay muhiim u tahay, tusaalooyinka, tixraacyada, fikradaha software-ka ee qallafsan, ama xaddidaadaha waqtiga.

fields.name: openSourceConsent (Ogolaanshaha Isticmaalka Macluumaadka)
fields.label: hagaagsan tahay horumarinta furan ee dadweynaha?
fields.helper: Mashaariicda la aqbalay waa kaydad dadweyne oo hoos yimaada IATF.

items: kaydka dadweynaha ee ururka IATF GitHub
injineer mas'uul ah oo loo xilsaaray mashruuca
liisanka copyleft ee koodhka iyo agabyada mashruuca

header.title: Codsi cad oo kooban ayaa ku filan in lagu bilaabo

paragraphs: Haddii aad u baahantahay helitaan dhab ah oo aad u maleyneyso inay tahay mashruuc dadweyne, noo soo dir.
